LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF JASON OCHOA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL AND FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF CANNOT STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST THE DEFENDANT NAMED IN THE PROPOSED SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. IN EXHIBIT I-A ATTACHED TO THE PROPOSED SAC, PLAINTIFF STATES THE ACCIDENT OCCURRED ON MAY 5, 2013. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS FOR PERSONAL INJURY CLAIMS AND PROPERTY DAMAGE CLAIMS EXPIRED ON MAY 5, 2012 AND MAY 6, 2013, RESPECTIVELY. (SEE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 335.1 AND 338.) PLAINTIFF DID NOT NAME DOE DEFENDANTS IN HIS PREVIOUS COMPLAINTS AND THEREFORE THE PROPOSED SAC DOES NOT RELATE BACK. (SEE FIREMAN'S FUND INS. CO. V. SPARKS CONST., INC. (2004) 114 CAL.APP.4TH 1135, 1144, HOLDING THAT FAILURE TO NAME DOE DEFENDANTS PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 474 DOES NOT PREVENT A PLAINTIFF FROM FILING AN AMENDMENT ADDING A NEW DEFENDANT; HOWEVER, IT DOES PREVENT THE AMENDMENT FROM RELATING BACK.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And File An Amended
Off Calendar Sep-26-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ARNOLD LEE OF THE THARPE & HOWELL, LLP, TEL. NO. (818) 205-9955 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff JASON OCHOA'S Motion to Set Aside Dismissal and File an Amended Complaint is denied. Plaintiff cannot state a cause of action against the defendant named in the proposed Second Amended Complaint. In Exhibit I-A attached to the proposed SAC, Plaintiff states the accident occurred on May 5, 2013. The statute of limitations for personal injury claims and property damage claims expired on May 5, 2012 and May 6, 2013, respectively. (See Code of Civil Procedure 335.1 and 338.) Plaintiff did not name Doe defendants in his previous complaints and therefore the proposed SAC does not relate back. (See Fireman's Fund Ins. Co. v. Sparks Const., Inc. (2004) 114 Cal.App.4th 1135, 1144, holding that failure to name Doe defendants pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure 474 does not prevent a plaintiff from filing an amendment adding a new defendant; however, it does prevent the amendment from relating back.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And File An Amended
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Continued To Sep-26-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jason Ochoa, plaintiff and moving appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

The matter was discussed. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JASON OCHOA'S Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And File An Amended Complaint is continued to September 26, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 17, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
